timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon is founded
description: Jeff Bezos incorporated Amazon.com, laying the groundwork for an online retail company.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon.com launches as an online bookstore
description: The website opened to customers, initially focusing on books sold over the internet.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon goes public
description: The company completed its initial public offering during the rapid growth of early internet commerce.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon expands into the United Kingdom and Germany
description: The company deepened its international reach with major European retail sites.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon Marketplace launches
description: Amazon expanded its platform by allowing independent sellers to list goods alongside its own retail offerings.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon Web Services is introduced
description: Amazon began offering web-based infrastructure and developer services that would become AWS.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon Prime launches
description: The membership program introduced fast shipping benefits that became central to Amazon’s retail model.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon S3 launches
description: Simple Storage Service became one of the foundational services of Amazon’s cloud platform.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon EC2 enters beta
description: Elastic Compute Cloud expanded AWS into on-demand computing capacity for developers and businesses.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Kindle is released
description: Amazon entered consumer hardware with its e-reader and expanded its role in digital publishing.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon acquires Kiva Systems
description: The purchase strengthened Amazon’s warehouse automation capabilities and logistics network.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Echo smart speaker debuts
description: Amazon launched the Echo, helping establish Alexa and the market for voice-controlled smart speakers.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: First Prime Day is held
description: Amazon created a new annual shopping event centered on Prime members.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon announces acquisition of Whole Foods
description: The deal pushed Amazon deeper into physical retail and grocery distribution.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon raises minimum wage to $15 in the United States
description: The company adopted a higher base wage for U.S. employees, drawing broad attention to its labor practices.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon co-founds the Climate Pledge
description: Amazon committed to net-zero carbon goals and launched a broader corporate climate initiative.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Pandemic demand reshapes Amazon operations
description: A surge in online shopping during the COVID-19 pandemic accelerated Amazon’s scale and logistics footprint.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Andy Jassy succeeds Jeff Bezos as CEO
description: Leadership of Amazon passed from its founder to longtime AWS chief Andy Jassy.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: Amazon closes its acquisition of MGM
description: The company strengthened its entertainment business by taking control of the Hollywood studio MGM.

timeline_description: Major milestones in Amazon’s evolution from an online bookstore into a global commerce, cloud computing, and technology company.
title: AWS announces Amazon Bedrock
description: Amazon moved more aggressively into generative AI infrastructure with the launch of Bedrock for foundation models.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Germany is divided into occupation zones
description: After the Second World War, the Allies divided Germany and Berlin into separate zones of occupation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Berlin Blockade begins
description: The Soviet Union blocked land access to West Berlin, prompting the Western airlift operation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Federal Republic of Germany is founded
description: The western occupation zones formed West Germany as a new federal state.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: German Democratic Republic is established
description: The Soviet zone became East Germany, formalizing the division of the country.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: East German uprising is suppressed
description: Workers’ protests against the communist regime were crushed with Soviet military support.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: West Germany joins NATO
description: West Germany entered the Western alliance, deepening the division of Europe during the Cold War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Khrushchev issues the Berlin ultimatum
description: The Soviet leader demanded that Western powers leave Berlin, escalating tensions over the city.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Construction of the Berlin Wall begins
description: East German authorities sealed the border and began building the barrier that became the symbol of divided Europe.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: John F. Kennedy visits West Berlin
description: The U.S. president publicly affirmed Western support for West Berlin in his famous speech.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Four Power Agreement on Berlin is signed
description: The wartime occupying powers reached an accord that improved access and reduced tension over Berlin.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Basic Treaty is signed
description: East and West Germany formally recognized each other and expanded practical cooperation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Mikhail Gorbachev becomes Soviet leader
description: Gorbachev’s reform agenda transformed the political context that had sustained the division of Germany.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Ronald Reagan calls to tear down the wall
description: At the Brandenburg Gate, Reagan publicly challenged the Soviet Union to open Berlin.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Hungary opens its border with Austria
description: The weakening of border controls in Eastern Europe created a route for East Germans to escape westward.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Monday demonstrations expand in Leipzig
description: Mass protests in East Germany accelerated the crisis of communist rule.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Berlin Wall falls
description: A confused announcement on travel regulations led crowds to the crossings, and East German guards opened the border.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: East Germany holds its first free parliamentary election
description: Voters backed parties favoring rapid reunification with West Germany.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Monetary, economic, and social union takes effect
description: West Germany’s deutsche mark became East Germany’s currency, integrating the two economies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Two Plus Four Treaty is signed
description: The four occupying powers and the two German states settled the external conditions for full German sovereignty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Berlin Wall and German Reunification
timeline_description: Major milestones in the division of Germany, the construction and fall of the Berlin Wall, and the reunification of Germany.
title: Germany is reunified
description: The German Democratic Republic acceded to the Federal Republic, ending the formal division of Germany.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Werner Report proposes economic and monetary union
description: A European Community plan set out an early vision for monetary integration and a common currency.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: European Monetary System begins
description: The EMS created a framework of exchange-rate cooperation that became an important precursor to the euro.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Delors Report charts the path to monetary union
description: The report laid out a staged plan for creating a single European currency and central bank.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Maastricht Treaty is signed
description: The treaty committed member states to economic and monetary union and set convergence rules for joining.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: European Monetary Institute is established
description: The EMI was created as the institutional predecessor to the European Central Bank.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Madrid European Council names the currency the euro
description: EU leaders agreed that the future single currency would be called the euro.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Stability and Growth Pact is agreed
description: EU governments adopted fiscal rules intended to support the credibility of the future single currency.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: European Central Bank is established
description: The ECB began operations as the new central institution for euro-area monetary policy.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Conversion rates are irrevocably fixed
description: The exchange rates of participating national currencies were locked ahead of the euro’s launch.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Euro is launched as a noncash currency
description: The euro began life for electronic payments, accounting, and financial markets in 11 member states.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Greece joins the euro area
description: Greece adopted the euro, expanding the membership of the single-currency area.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Euro banknotes and coins enter circulation
description: Physical euro cash replaced national currencies in everyday use across the participating states.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Slovenia adopts the euro
description: Slovenia became the first of the 2004 EU entrants to join the euro area.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Cyprus and Malta adopt the euro
description: Two additional Mediterranean member states entered the euro area.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Slovakia adopts the euro
description: Slovakia replaced the koruna with the euro as the country’s official currency.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Estonia adopts the euro
description: Estonia joined the euro area after meeting the convergence requirements.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Latvia adopts the euro
description: Latvia became the eighteenth member of the euro area.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Lithuania adopts the euro
description: Lithuania entered the euro area, completing adoption across the Baltic states.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Croatia adopts the euro
description: Croatia became the twentieth member of the euro area and replaced the kuna with the euro.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, launch, expansion, and adoption of the euro as the common currency of the euro area.
title: Euro area expands to 20 member states
description: With Croatia’s entry, the euro became the official currency of 20 European Union countries.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: BackRub search project begins at Stanford
description: Larry Page and Sergey Brin started developing the search technology that would evolve into Google.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Domain google.com is registered
description: The company’s future brand identity took shape with the registration of the google.com domain name.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: First Google Doodle appears
description: A modified logo announcing the founders’ trip to Burning Man became the first Google Doodle.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Andy Bechtolsheim writes the first major check
description: Early funding from Sun co-founder Andy Bechtolsheim helped turn the project into a company.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Google is incorporated
description: Google Inc. was formally incorporated in California as a new search company.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Google launches AdWords
description: The new advertising platform created the revenue engine that would finance Google’s rapid expansion.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Google Image Search launches
description: The company expanded beyond web search with a dedicated image search service.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Eric Schmidt becomes chief executive
description: Google brought in Eric Schmidt as CEO while Page and Brin remained central leaders.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Google introduces AdSense
description: AdSense extended Google’s advertising model to partner websites across the web.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Gmail is announced
description: Google launched its webmail service, which became one of its most widely used products.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Google goes public
description: The company completed its initial public offering and became a publicly traded corporation.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Google Maps launches
description: Google entered digital mapping with a service that became central to its mobile and location ecosystem.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Google acquires Android
description: The purchase of Android positioned Google to become a major force in mobile computing.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Google acquires YouTube
description: The company bought YouTube, greatly expanding its reach in online video.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Google Chrome launches
description: Google released its own web browser, challenging established competitors and reshaping the browser market.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: First commercial Android phone is announced
description: The T-Mobile G1 marked the market debut of the Android mobile platform.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Larry Page returns as chief executive
description: Page resumed the CEO role as Google entered a new phase of product consolidation and expansion.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Knowledge Graph is introduced
description: Google added a semantic knowledge layer to search results, expanding beyond simple link retrieval.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Alphabet reorganization is announced
description: Google was restructured under the new parent company Alphabet, separating the core internet business from other bets.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the growth of Google from a Stanford research project into a global technology company and Alphabet subsidiary.
title: Sundar Pichai becomes CEO of Alphabet
description: Pichai added leadership of Alphabet to his existing role as CEO of Google.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Nuclear fission is discovered
description: German chemists identified nuclear fission, opening the path toward a possible chain reaction and atomic weapon.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Einstein-Szilard letter warns Roosevelt
description: Albert Einstein signed a letter urging the U.S. president to consider the military implications of uranium research.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Advisory Committee on Uranium meets
description: The Roosevelt administration took its first formal step toward supporting uranium research.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: National Defense Research Committee is created
description: The United States expanded federal coordination of scientific research for national defense.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Office of Scientific Research and Development is established
description: The new agency provided a stronger structure for secret wartime research, including atomic work.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: U.S. entry into the war accelerates bomb development
description: After Pearl Harbor, atomic research moved more rapidly toward a full wartime program.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Manhattan Project is formally launched
description: The Army assigned the atomic bomb effort to the Manhattan Engineer District.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Leslie Groves takes command
description: General Leslie R. Groves assumed leadership of the project and drove its rapid expansion.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Chicago Pile-1 achieves the first controlled chain reaction
description: Enrico Fermi’s team demonstrated a self-sustaining nuclear chain reaction under the stands of Stagg Field.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Oppenheimer takes charge of Los Alamos laboratory
description: J. Robert Oppenheimer became scientific director of the laboratory that would design the bombs.
location: Los Alamos, New Mexico, United States

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: X-10 Graphite Reactor reaches criticality
description: Oak Ridge achieved an important production milestone in reactor technology and plutonium research.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Hanford B Reactor goes critical
description: The first large-scale plutonium production reactor began operation at Hanford.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Y-12 supplies weapon-grade uranium for bomb work
description: Electromagnetic separation at Oak Ridge produced enriched uranium for the Little Boy weapon.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: President Truman is briefed on the project
description: After Franklin Roosevelt’s death, Harry S. Truman learned the scale and purpose of the secret atomic program.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Trinity test succeeds
description: The first detonation of a nuclear device took place in the New Mexico desert, proving the implosion design.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Atomic bomb is dropped on Hiroshima
description: The United States used the uranium bomb Little Boy against Hiroshima.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Atomic bomb is dropped on Nagasaki
description: The United States used the plutonium implosion bomb Fat Man against Nagasaki.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Japan announces its surrender
description: The emperor accepted Allied terms, bringing the Pacific War to an end after the atomic bombings and Soviet entry into the war.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Atomic Energy Act becomes law
description: The United States transferred future control of atomic energy from the military to a civilian framework.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and political milestones in the development of the first atomic bombs during and immediately after the Second World War.
title: Atomic Energy Commission takes over from the Army
description: Civilian administration of the U.S. atomic program began, formally closing the Manhattan Project era.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Balboa reaches the Pacific across the isthmus
description: Vasco Núñez de Balboa’s crossing demonstrated the narrowness of the isthmus and encouraged later canal schemes.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Charles V orders a survey for a canal route
description: The Spanish crown examined whether a passage could be cut across Panama.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: French canal construction begins
description: A company led by Ferdinand de Lesseps started work on a sea-level canal across Panama.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: French canal company collapses
description: Financial failure, disease, and engineering difficulties forced the first major canal effort to stop.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: United States passes the Spooner Act
description: Congress authorized the purchase of French canal assets and favored a Panamanian route over Nicaragua.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Hay-Bunau-Varilla Treaty is signed
description: The treaty gave the United States rights to build and administer a canal zone in newly independent Panama.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: United States takes control of the project
description: American administration formally began the construction effort inherited from the French.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Sanitation campaign transforms the canal zone
description: Mosquito control and public health reforms sharply reduced yellow fever and malaria among workers.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Theodore Roosevelt visits the canal works
description: Roosevelt became the first sitting U.S. president to travel abroad, underscoring the canal’s strategic importance.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Lock canal design is adopted decisively
description: Engineers committed to a lock-based canal rather than a sea-level cut, shaping the project’s final form.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Gamboa dike blast joins the canal route
description: A ceremonial explosion eliminated a key barrier and marked the near completion of the canal channel.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Panama Canal opens to traffic
description: The cargo ship SS Ancon made the first official transit through the completed canal.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Third Locks project begins
description: The United States started a major expansion project to accommodate larger warships and vessels.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Third Locks work is halted during wartime
description: The expansion project was suspended before completion as priorities shifted during the Second World War.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Remón-Eisenhower Treaty revises canal arrangements
description: Panama secured improved financial terms and concessions from the United States over canal administration.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Canal Zone riots erupt
description: Violence over sovereignty and flag display intensified Panamanian demands to renegotiate U.S. control.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Torrijos-Carter Treaties are signed
description: The agreements set a timetable for the transfer of the canal from the United States to Panama.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Canal Zone is abolished
description: The former U.S.-administered zone formally ended as treaty implementation moved forward.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Panama assumes full control of the canal
description: Administrative authority over the canal passed completely to Panama under the treaty timetable.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the conception, construction, transfer, and expansion of the Panama Canal.
title: Expanded canal opens
description: A major widening project with new locks allowed larger Neopanamax ships to use the canal.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Bloody Sunday sparks revolution of 1905
description: Imperial troops fired on demonstrators in St. Petersburg, triggering nationwide unrest against the tsarist regime.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Nicholas II issues the October Manifesto
description: The tsar promised civil liberties and a legislative assembly in an attempt to contain revolutionary pressure.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: First State Duma convenes
description: Russia opened its first national representative assembly, though the tsar retained decisive authority.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Russia enters the First World War
description: The empire joined the war against the Central Powers, deepening social strain, military losses, and political discontent.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Grigori Rasputin is killed
description: The murder of Rasputin symbolized the breakdown of confidence at the imperial court in the final months of Romanov rule.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: February Revolution begins in Petrograd
description: Demonstrations over bread shortages and the war escalated into a mass uprising that collapsed imperial authority.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Nicholas II abdicates
description: The last Russian tsar gave up the throne, ending more than three centuries of Romanov rule.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Lenin returns to Russia
description: Vladimir Lenin arrived in Petrograd and pushed the Bolsheviks toward a strategy of immediate revolutionary confrontation.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: July Days unrest shakes the Provisional Government
description: Armed demonstrations in Petrograd failed to bring the Bolsheviks to power but exposed the government’s weakness.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Kornilov Affair undermines the government
description: The failed move by General Lavr Kornilov against Petrograd discredited conservative forces and strengthened the Bolsheviks.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Constituent Assembly elections are held
description: A nationwide vote produced a Socialist Revolutionary plurality, setting up conflict with the Bolshevik regime.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Bolsheviks seize power in the October Revolution
description: Red Guards and allied forces overthrew the Provisional Government and transferred power to the Soviets.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: The Cheka is established
description: The Bolsheviks created a political police force to suppress opposition and defend the revolution.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Red Army is founded
description: The new Soviet government organized the Workers’ and Peasants’ Red Army as civil war widened.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Treaty of Brest-Litovsk is signed
description: Soviet Russia made peace with the Central Powers and left the First World War at heavy territorial cost.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Former tsar Nicholas II and his family are executed
description: The Romanovs were killed by Bolshevik guards as anti-Bolshevik forces advanced during the civil war.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Communist International is founded
description: The Bolsheviks created the Comintern to coordinate and encourage revolutionary movements abroad.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Kronstadt rebellion is crushed
description: Soviet forces suppressed the naval uprising, marking a decisive turn against dissent within the revolutionary camp.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Lenin introduces the New Economic Policy
description: The Bolshevik leadership relaxed war communism and restored limited private trade to stabilize the economy.

timeline_description: Major political and military events from the crisis of tsarist rule through the Bolshevik seizure of power and the creation of the Soviet state.
title: Union of Soviet Socialist Republics is established
description: The new Soviet federation formally united Russia, Ukraine, Belarus, and Transcaucasia under one state.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Second Spanish Republic is proclaimed
description: Municipal election results and political pressure led to the collapse of the monarchy and the declaration of a republic.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Republican constitution is adopted
description: Spain approved a new constitution that expanded secular reforms and intensified political polarization.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Right-leaning parties win national elections
description: The election shifted power away from the republican left and deepened conflict over the republic’s direction.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Asturias uprising is suppressed
description: A workers’ revolt in Asturias was crushed by government forces, foreshadowing the violence to come.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Popular Front wins the election
description: A left-wing coalition returned to power amid social unrest and growing fears on the right.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Military uprising begins in Spanish Morocco
description: Army officers launched the revolt that quickly spread to the mainland and opened the civil war.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Non-Intervention Committee is formed
description: European powers adopted a non-intervention policy that failed to prevent major foreign involvement in the war.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Francisco Franco becomes Generalissimo and head of state
description: Nationalist commanders unified leadership under Franco, consolidating his political and military authority.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: International Brigades enter the war
description: Foreign volunteers began arriving to fight for the Republic, turning the conflict into a major ideological battleground.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Battle for Madrid begins
description: Nationalist forces attacked the capital, but Republican resistance prevented a quick victory.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Guernica is bombed
description: German aircraft supporting the Nationalists destroyed much of the Basque town in one of the war’s most infamous attacks.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Bilbao falls to Nationalist forces
description: The capture of Bilbao marked a major Nationalist success in the northern campaign.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Battle of Teruel begins
description: Republican forces briefly captured Teruel before Nationalist counterattacks reversed the gain.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Nationalist Aragon offensive reaches the Mediterranean
description: Franco’s armies split Republican territory in two, severely weakening the Republic’s strategic position.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Battle of the Ebro begins
description: The Republic launched its final major offensive in an effort to regain the initiative.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Republican forces withdraw from the Ebro
description: The failure of the Ebro campaign left the Republic militarily exhausted.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Barcelona falls
description: Nationalist troops captured Barcelona, dealing a decisive blow to Republican resistance in Catalonia.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Britain and France recognize Franco’s government
description: Major European powers formally recognized the Nationalist regime before the war had fully ended.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Madrid falls to the Nationalists
description: Republican control of the capital collapsed after internal division and final Nationalist advances.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Spanish Civil War
timeline_description: Major political and military developments from the fall of the monarchy to the Nationalist victory in the Spanish Civil War.
title: Franco declares the war over
description: Nationalist victory ended the civil war and began Franco’s long dictatorship in Spain.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Guillaume Apollinaire uses the term surrealism
description: Apollinaire introduced the term in a wartime cultural context, helping establish the movement’s future name.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Breton and Soupault publish Les Champs Magnétiques
description: The text became an early landmark of automatist writing and proto-surrealist practice.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Dada and emerging surrealist circles deepen their break
description: The Paris avant-garde moved away from Dada toward a distinct movement centered on the unconscious.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Bureau of Surrealist Research opens
description: The movement created an institutional center for collecting dreams, texts, and experiments.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Breton publishes the First Manifesto of Surrealism
description: André Breton defined surrealism around psychic automatism, dream logic, and the liberation of thought.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: La Révolution surréaliste begins publication
description: The journal became a central forum for surrealist writing, theory, and visual experimentation.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Breton publishes Nadja
description: The book became one of the movement’s defining literary works, blending narrative, psychology, and urban chance.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Second Manifesto of Surrealism is issued
description: Breton restated the movement’s aims while sharpening internal divisions and political commitments.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Le Surréalisme au service de la révolution begins publication
description: The movement’s new journal reflected a stronger revolutionary and anti-bourgeois orientation.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Salvador Dalí emerges as a central surrealist figure
description: Dalí’s rise helped popularize the movement through a highly distinctive visual language of dream imagery.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: International Surrealist Exhibition opens in London
description: The landmark exhibition announced surrealism’s major arrival in Britain.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: MoMA presents Fantastic Art, Dada, Surrealism
description: The New York exhibition helped establish surrealism’s importance for an American audience.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Art and Liberty group forms in Cairo
description: The emergence of Egyptian surrealism demonstrated the movement’s growing international reach beyond Europe.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: International Surrealist Exhibition opens in Paris
description: The elaborate Paris exhibition became one of the movement’s most famous collective presentations.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: War disperses the surrealist movement
description: The German occupation of France forced many surrealists into exile, especially to the Americas.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: First Papers of Surrealism opens in New York
description: The movement reassembled in exile and mounted an influential exhibition in the United States.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: International Exhibition of Surrealism is staged in Paris
description: The postwar exhibition signaled the movement’s renewed public presence in Europe.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Exposition InteRnatiOnale du Surréalisme is held in Paris
description: A later major group exhibition demonstrated the movement’s continued vitality after its classic phase.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: André Breton dies
description: The death of surrealism’s principal theorist marked the end of the movement’s founding generation.

timeline_description: Major manifestos, publications, exhibitions, and turning points in the history of Surrealism as an international artistic and literary movement.
title: Surrealism Beyond Borders highlights the movement’s global scope
description: A major Tate Modern exhibition emphasized surrealism as an international movement extending far beyond Paris.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: International Office of Public Health is established
description: An early international health body was created in Paris and later became one institutional predecessor of WHO.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: League of Nations Health Organization is created
description: The League developed a health body whose work later informed the structure and mission of WHO.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: UN delegates propose a global health agency
description: At the San Francisco conference, diplomats advanced the idea of a new international health organization.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: WHO constitution is signed
description: Delegates adopted and signed the constitution establishing the World Health Organization.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: World Health Organization comes into force
description: WHO officially began operations; the date is now commemorated annually as World Health Day.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: International Sanitary Regulations are adopted
description: WHO established an early common framework for cross-border disease control and quarantine rules.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: Global malaria eradication program begins
description: WHO launched a major campaign to eliminate malaria using mid-century public-health strategies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: Smallpox eradication is proposed at WHO
description: A Soviet-backed resolution placed global smallpox eradication on the organization’s agenda.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: International Agency for Research on Cancer is established
description: WHO created a specialized cancer research agency based in Lyon.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: Intensified Smallpox Eradication Programme begins
description: WHO greatly expanded the campaign that would soon eliminate smallpox worldwide.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: International Health Regulations replace earlier sanitary rules
description: WHO updated the legal framework for international reporting and disease-control obligations.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: Expanded Programme on Immunization is launched
description: WHO began a major effort to increase routine childhood vaccination coverage worldwide.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: First WHO Model List of Essential Medicines is issued
description: WHO published a foundational list to guide countries on priority medicines for health systems.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: Alma-Ata Declaration endorses primary health care
description: A landmark conference backed primary health care as the path toward health for all.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: Smallpox is declared eradicated
description: WHO certified the global eradication of smallpox, one of the greatest achievements in public health history.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: Global Polio Eradication Initiative is launched
description: WHO and partner organizations began a long-term campaign to eliminate polio worldwide.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: Framework Convention on Tobacco Control is adopted
description: WHO member states agreed to the first global public-health treaty negotiated under WHO auspices.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: Revised International Health Regulations are adopted
description: WHO updated the regulations after the SARS outbreak to strengthen global outbreak reporting and response.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: WHO declares the H1N1 influenza pandemic
description: The organization formally recognized the worldwide spread of the new influenza A(H1N1) virus.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Health Organization
timeline_description: Major institutional, policy, and public-health milestones in the history of the World Health Organization and its predecessors.
title: WHO characterizes COVID-19 as a pandemic
description: The organization announced that the global spread of COVID-19 had reached pandemic status.
